channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [SHUKRAPHAR] Shukra Pharma Allots 17.35 Lakh Equity Shares on Warrant Conversion
item.description:
Shukra Pharmaceuticals Ltd. has allotted 17,35,000 fully paid-up equity shares to Dakshesh Shah and Parshva Texchem India Private Limited (Promoters) upon conversion of warrants. The allotment was made for cash, with the company receiving ₹4,42,42,500. Consequent to this allotment, the paid-up equity capital increased from ₹43,78,79,440 to ₹43,96,14,440. The board also approved the audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, and recommended a final dividend of ₹0.01 per share.

  • Shukra Pharma allots 17,35,000 equity shares to promoters on warrant conversion.
  • Company receives ₹4,42,42,500 from the warrant conversion.
  • Paid-up equity capital increases to ₹43,96,14,440 post-allotment.
  • Board approves audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Final dividend of ₹0.01 per share recommended for FY26.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shukra Pharmaceuticals Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [VIVANZA] Vivanza Biosciences: Reg 23(9) Not Applicable for FY26
item.description:
Vivanza Biosciences Ltd. announces that Regulation 23(9) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, concerning the disclosure of related party transactions, will not be applicable for the quarter and year ending March 31, 2026. As of March 31, 2025, the company's paid-up equity share capital is ₹4,00,00,000 and its net worth is ₹4,02,03,752.40, which falls below the threshold of ₹10 Crores and ₹25 Crores respectively, as per Regulation 15(2) of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

  • Regulation 23(9) of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 not applicable for FY26.
  • Paid-up equity share capital as of March 31, 2025: ₹4,00,00,000.
  • Net worth as of March 31, 2025: ₹4,02,03,752.40.
  • Company will comply with regulations within six months of applicability.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vivanza Biosciences Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [VIKRAMSOLR] Vikram Solar: Monitoring Agency Report for Q4 FY26
item.description:
Vikram Solar Ltd submitted the Monitoring Agency Report by India Ratings & Research Private Limited for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, in compliance with SEBI regulations. The report, dated May 07, 2026, confirms no deviation from the objects of the IPO based on management representation and a Statutory Auditor Certificate. The IPO consisted of a fresh issue of ₹15,000.00 Million and an offer for sale of ₹5,793.69 Mn.

  • Monitoring Agency Report for Q4 FY26 submitted by Vikram Solar.
  • India Ratings & Research confirms no deviation from IPO objectives.
  • Report based on management representation and auditor certificate.
  • IPO included a fresh issue of ₹15,000.00 Million.
  • Report as per Schedule XI of the SEBI ICDR Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vikram Solar Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [ROUTE] Route Mobile FY26: Revenue ₹4,408.21 Cr, PAT ₹256.94 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Route Mobile Limited announced its Q4FY26 and FY26 results. FY26 revenue stood at ₹4,408.21 crore, compared to ₹4,575.62 crore in FY25. PAT was reported at ₹256.94 crore, down from ₹333.93 crore in FY25. For Q4FY26, revenue was ₹1,130.90 crore, and PAT was ₹114.43 crore. The company projects mid to high single-digit revenue growth and an adjusted EBITDA margin of around 12% for FY27, with a gross dividend per share increased to ₹16.5.

  • FY26 Revenue from operations at ₹4,408.21 crore.
  • FY26 PAT reported at ₹256.94 crore.
  • Q4FY26 Revenue from operations at ₹1,130.90 crore.
  • Q4FY26 PAT reported at ₹114.43 crore.
  • FY27 guidance includes mid to high single-digit revenue growth.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Route Mobile Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [VIVANZA] Vivanza Biosciences: Audited Results, MD & CS Resignations
item.description:
Vivanza Biosciences Ltd. announced audited standalone financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board approved the results and noted the resignations of Hemant A. Parikh as a Non-Executive Director (effective March 17, 2026) and Chaitra Arora as Company Secretary & Compliance Officer (effective April 30, 2026). The board also approved the reconstitution of various committees, including the Audit Committee and Nomination & Remuneration Committee, effective May 7, 2026.

  • Audited standalone financial results for Q4 and FY26 approved.
  • Hemant A. Parikh resigned as Non-Executive Director effective March 17, 2026.
  • Chaitra Arora resigned as Company Secretary & Compliance Officer effective April 30, 2026.
  • Board committees reconstituted effective May 7, 2026.
  • Shivam Soni & Co. issued an audit opinion on the standalone financial results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vivanza Biosciences Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SHRIGANG] Shri Gang Industries: High Court Stays Tax Order
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Shri Gang Industries & Allied Products Ltd. received an order under Section 9(2) of the Central Sales Tax Act, 1956 and Section 28(2)(ii) of the UP VAT Act from the Deputy Commissioner, State Tax, Sikandrabad, Uttar Pradesh. The company filed a Writ Petition with the High Court of Judicature at Allahabad. The High Court has ordered the Respondents to file a Counter Affidavit, the Petitioner to file a Rejoinder, and has stayed the operation and effect of the order until the next listing date.

  • Shri Gang Industries challenged a tax order in Allahabad High Court.
  • High Court directs respondents to file a counter affidavit.
  • Company to file a rejoinder in response.
  • Operation of the tax order is stayed until the next hearing.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SHRI GANG INDUSTRIES AND ALLIED PRODUCTS LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [SHRIGANG] Shri Gang Industries: Promoter Reclassification Approved
item.description:
The Board of Directors of Shri Gang Industries & Allied Products Ltd approved the reclassification requests from Mr. Ajay Gupta, Mr. Shailesh Gupta, Mr. Siddharth Gupta, and Mr. Ramesh Gupta from the "Promoter & Promoter Group" category to the "Public" category. This decision, made on May 07, 2026, is subject to stock exchange approval. The board noted that the outgoing promoters do not have control over the company's management, hold less than 10% voting rights, and are not willful defaulters or fugitive economic offenders. The company complies with minimum public shareholding requirements.

  • Shri Gang Industries approves reclassification of promoters to public category.
  • Reclassification is subject to stock exchange approval.
  • Outgoing promoters hold less than 10% voting rights.
  • Company complies with minimum public shareholding norms.
  • Board confirms promoters are not willful defaulters.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SHRI GANG INDUSTRIES AND ALLIED PRODUCTS LTD. | Category: Promoter Reclassification

item.title: [ROUTE] Route Mobile Reappoints Nicolas Lecomte as Internal Auditor
item.description:
Route Mobile Ltd has re-appointed Mr. Nicolas Lecomte as the Internal Auditor for the financial year 2026-27. The Board of Directors approved this decision based on the recommendation of the Audit Committee. The board also approved the audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, recommended a final dividend of ₹2 per share, noted the lapse of stock options, approved a variation in IPO proceeds utilization, and appointed senior management personnel.

  • Nicolas Lecomte re-appointed as Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27.
  • Board approved audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Final dividend of ₹2 per share recommended for FY 2025-26.
  • Variation in the object/ terms of utilisation of the Initial Public Offering (“IPO”) proceeds approved.
  • Appointment of Mr. Alyque Sequeira and Mr. Gaurav Jhunjunwala as Senior Management Personnel approved.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Route Mobile Ltd | Category: Auditor

item.title: [IIFLSEC] IIFL Capital: Open Offer for 26% Shares by FIH Mauritius
item.description:
🔥 Trending

IIFL Capital Services Ltd has announced a public open offer by FIH Mauritius Investments Ltd, along with HWIC Asia Fund (Class A Shares) as a person acting in concert, to acquire up to 10,01,44,112 equity shares, representing 26% of the expanded voting share capital. The offer is made pursuant to SEBI regulations, with ICICI Securities Limited acting as the manager to the offer. The target company's expanded voting share capital includes subscription shares and employee stock options.

  • FIH Mauritius Investments Ltd announces open offer for IIFL Capital Services.
  • Offer targets acquisition of 26% of IIFL Capital's expanded voting share capital.
  • ICICI Securities Limited is managing the open offer on behalf of the acquirer.
  • The open offer is in compliance with SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011.
  • Offer involves acquisition of up to 10,01,44,112 equity shares.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IIFL Securities Ltd | Category: Open Offer

item.title: [VIKRAMSOLR] Vikram Solar: FY26 Results Approved; ₹3,726 Cr Capex for 6 GW Facility
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Vikram Solar Ltd's board approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026. The board also approved a ₹3,726 crore capital expenditure for a 6 GW backward-integrated wafer and ingot facility in Tamil Nadu by FY29, part of a larger 12 GW roadmap by FY30. Additionally, key management appointments and re-appointments were approved, including Sameer Nagpal as Whole-time Director and CEO, and the re-appointments of Gyanesh Chaudhary and Ratnabali Kakkar.

  • Audited FY26 standalone and consolidated financial results approved with unmodified opinion from auditors.
  • ₹3,726 crore capex approved for 6 GW wafer and ingot facility in Tamil Nadu by FY29.
  • Sameer Nagpal appointed as Whole-time Director and CEO, effective May 7, 2026.
  • Gyanesh Chaudhary re-appointed as Chairman & Managing Director for 3 years.
  • VSL Green Power Private Limited is now a material subsidiary.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vikram Solar Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result
